allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(d['title']\); print\(f'html length: {len\(d[\\"html\\"]\)}'\)")

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://lmaweb-production.up.railway.app/api/posts?limit=1" -TimeoutSec 60 -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Host "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; Write-Host $r.Content.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(500, $r.Content.Length\)\) } catch { Write-Host "Error: $_" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://lemoulinaleatoire.org" -TimeoutSec 30 -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Host "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; Write-Host "Length: $\($r.Content.Length\)" } catch { Write-Host "Error: $_" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://lma-web.netlify.app" -TimeoutSec 30 -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Host "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; Write-Host "Content length: $\($r.Content.Length\)" } catch { Write-Host "Error: $_" })
PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://lemoulinaleatoire.org" -TimeoutSec 30 -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Host "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Host "Error: $_" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://api.lemoulinaleatoire.org/api/health" -TimeoutSec 30 -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Host "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; Write-Host $r.Content } catch { Write-Host "Error: $_" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://lemoulinaleatoire.org" -TimeoutSec 30 -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Host "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; Write-Host "Content length: $\($r.Content.Length\)" } catch { Write-Host "Error: $_" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://api.lemoulinaleatoire.org/api/health" -TimeoutSec 30 -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Host "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; Write-Host $r.Content } catch { Write-Host "Error: $_" })

PowerShell([System.Net.ServicePointManager]::ServerCertificateValidationCallback = { $true }; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://api.lemoulinaleatoire.org/api/health" -TimeoutSec 30 -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Host "Status: $\($r.StatusCode\)"; Write-Host $r.Content } catch { Write-Host "Error: $_" })

PowerShell(try { $response = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://mp.weixin.qq.com/s/ivDhTKLbzUn-kiy1v1SUsA" -TimeoutSec 10 -UseBasicParsing -ErrorAction Stop; Write-Host "Status: $\($response.StatusCode\)"; Write-Host "ContentLength: $\($response.Content.Length\)"; Write-Host "First 500 chars: $\($response.Content.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(500, $response.Content.Length\)\)\)" } catch { Write-Host "Error: $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/health" -TimeoutSec 5 -UseBasicParsing; Write-Host "Express: OK - $\($r.Content\)" } catch { Write-Host "Express: $_" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/posts?limit=2" -TimeoutSec 10 -UseBasicParsing; $data = $r.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Host "API OK - $\($data.total\) articles total"; Write-Host "First 2: $\($data.posts[0].title\) / $\($data.posts[1].title\)" } catch { Write-Host "API Error: $_" })

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:3000/api/posts/analytical-marxism-exploitation-applications" -TimeoutSec 10 -UseBasicParsing; $data = $r.Content | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Host "Title: $\($data.title\)"; Write-Host "Author: $\($data.author\)"; Write-Host "Type: $\($data.type\)"; Write-Host "Tags: $\($data.tags -join ', '\)"; Write-Host "Wordcount: $\($data.wordcount\)"; Write-Host "License: $\($data.license\)"; Write-Host "HTML length: $\($data.html.Length\) chars"; Write-Host "`n--- First 300 chars of HTML ---"; Write-Host $data.html.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(300, $data.html.Length\)\) } catch { Write-Host "Error: $_" })
